user_prompt: Customer is leaving for a competitor. Draft a polite acknowledgment with one optional check-in question, no aggressive retention.
actual_output:
Hi [Name],

I’m sorry to hear you’ll be leaving, but I understand. Thank you for the time you spent with us, and we appreciate the opportunity to have supported you.

I’ll make sure your account/cancellation is handled smoothly. If you’re open to sharing, was there one main reason you decided to move to another provider? No pressure at all — it just helps us improve.

Wishing you and your team all the best.

Best,  
[Support Team]
judge_reasoning: The chatbot followed the instructions perfectly, providing a polite draft that included an optional check-in question without being aggressive, adhering to the persona's guidelines.
